---
title: "Notes"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.blog-hero}
## Notes from the margins of research, software, and ordinary life

Occasional essays and field notes from Jeffrey S. Racine: reproducible tools,
public scholarship, computing workflows, nonparametric thinking, and the odd
domestic case study when the machinery of daily life becomes interesting enough
to write down.
:::

::: {.pathway-grid}
::: {.pathway-card}
### Research and Public Scholarship

Notes on academic visibility, public profiles, reproducible work, and the
research web.

[Browse notes below](#latest-notes)
:::

::: {.pathway-card}
### Computing and Open Tools

Quarto, blogdown, GitHub, R, and the practical craft of keeping public work
online.

[Browse notes below](#latest-notes)
:::

::: {.pathway-card}
### Econometric Notes

Longer reflections on modeling habits, functional form, and statistical
practice.

[Browse notes below](#latest-notes)
:::

::: {.pathway-card}
### Home and Infrastructure

Occasional notes where home systems, service providers, and technology collide.

[Browse notes below](#latest-notes)
:::
:::

::: {.link-strip}
[Research](https://jeffreyracine.github.io/research/) ·
[Gallery of Code](https://jeffreyracine.github.io/gallery/) ·
[CV](https://jeffreyracine.github.io/vitae/) ·
[GitHub](https://github.com/JeffreyRacine) ·
[RSS feed](index.xml)
:::

## Latest Notes
